title: My HUSKY Talks To ALEXA |  (She Beat up Alexa!)
description:
Maya the Husky Argues with Alexa and BEATS her up!
We have had our Alexa laying around for a while and decided to get Maya's reaction  talking to her.
Maya was of course ready to talk to Alexa.
Alexa told Maya she sucks at Kung Fu and she was not happy! Let’s just say some paws were thrown...
